author.name: Allison Nguyen
author.instructions: Fill out all relevant fields in this document. If you are not using a field (i.e., you don't have any code blocks) then fully delete that field. Within the 'projects' array below, include 1 entry for each of your experiments. You can copy and past for additional projects.

projects.description: This is a material that mimics the look of an LED screen. It was created using Nikolay Shamaev's 'Realistic LED emissive screen material' tutorial.

This is a material shader that creates a comic-like halftone shaded look. It was created using Unreal Engine's 'Stylized Comic Ink Material' tutorial and was modified to be used for halftones and add color. There are options to change the two colors and offset/size of halftone.
This is a post-process material [ADD TO LATER]. It was created using Nils Gallist's 'Realtime Bitmap Shader' tutorial and was modified to add options for three-tone and full colors
